examples: The attributes can all be grouped into four main categories: manipulation, identification, stimulation and evocation.
He thrilled the home audience by speaking in his native Tamil, closing his second acceptance speech with the evocation: "God is great."
This word crime overpassed the measure of what Marius, who was already greatly agitated by the abrupt evocation of Waterloo, could accept.
For Portuguese speakers these works have long been an evocation of a seafaring heritage in which many take pride.
Mr Chaudhuri holds our attention with unobtrusive evocation of place, texture and humanity.
